description:
An open-source ebook reader designed for immersive and deep reading experiences.

Readest is a modern, feature-rich ebook reader designed for avid readers offering seamless cross-platform access, powerful tools, and an intuitive interface to elevate your reading experience.
What's Changed
- css: enhanced compatibility with the text-indent CSS property, closes #1267 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1271
- translator: also translate table of contents by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1273
- layout: hide the header bar only on mobile platforms when translation is enabled by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1274
- translator: add daily translation quota for deepl by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1275
- translator: lazy load translation observer by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1282
- config: add theme mode options in the library page by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1283
- tts: show speaking sentence and chapter info in tts media session by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1289
- translator: disable translator if the system language is the same with the book language by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1290
- tts: read from last read sentence in tts by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1291
- bump: catch up foliate-js upstream by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1292
- tts: more robust way to save last speaking location for tts by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1293
- fix: notebook now won't prevent pagination, closes #1285 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1294
- feat: add an option to enable JavaScript in EPUB, closes #1278 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1295
- release: version 0.9.51 by @chrox in https://github.com/readest/readest/pull/1296
Full Changelog: https://github.com/readest/readest/compare/v0.9.50...v0.9.51
